name: Grid
searchText: grid responsive 12 columns grid system @mantine/core /core/grid align breakpoints columngap columns gap grow justify overflow rowgap type align offset order span

props.name: columnGap
props.description: Column gap, overrides gap for horizontal spacing

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in each row

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between columns and rows, key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value

props.name: grow
props.description: If set, columns in the last row expand to fill all available space

props.name: overflow
props.description: Sets overflow CSS property on the root element

props.name: rowGap
props.description: Row gap, overrides gap for vertical spacing

props.name: type
props.description: Type of queries used for responsive styles

props.name: align
props.description: Vertical alignment of the column, controls align-self CSS property

props.name: offset
props.description: Column start offset – number of empty columns before this column

props.name: order
props.description: Column order, use to reorder columns at different viewport sizes
